name: TC4 Infusion Matrix Parity Start
fixed: Split Infusion Matrix state into original TC4 active vs crafting phases instead of starting recipes on the first wand click.
Added onWandRightClick adapter: inactive+validLocation activates, active+not crafting starts crafting, crafting reports status.
Activation now requires original validLocation shape: center pedestal at matrixY-2 and four diagonal infusion pillars.
Runtime now persists TC4-style count, craftCount, symmetry and recipeInstability state.
Saved original TC4 NBT aliases active, crafting, instability, recipeinst, recipetype and recipeplayer alongside modern fields.
InfusionStructureReport exposes originalSymmetryPenalty and crafting starts from symmetry + recipeInstability.
Separated ESSENTIA_DRAIN_RANGE=12 from CRAFT_CYCLE_DELAY=10 so scan radius is not misused as delay.
Component consumption now uses a TravellingComponent delay to spawn source particles before removal after the original five tick itemCount delay.
Infusion HUD overlay now renders only while crafting rather than merely active.
Copied original textures/models/infuser.png into active resources for the upcoming TileRunicMatrixRenderer parity pass.
still_not_full_original: TileRunicMatrixRenderer cube split/startup rotation/halo rendering is not fully rebuilt yet.
NBTBase and Enchantment recipe outputs from craftingFinish still need exact adapters.
Infusion enchantment XP drain and runic augment behavior need exact source parity.
PacketFXInfusionSource and PacketFXBlockZap are approximated with local particles and need source packet adapters.
Flux goo/gas failure effects are still adapter-grade pending exact flux block parity.
Component matching still needs exact ItemStack damage/NBT parity where original recipes require it.
next_stage: Stage208 Infusion Matrix renderer + output/enchantment parity
